hero.phraseHistory: What if a famous face in history was part of your story?
hero.phrasePhotos: Who's in your photos that no one has named yet?
hero.phraseMoments: Planning something special? Share every moment in one place.
hero.description: Old photographs often hold connections you may not even know exist. Viking Roots invites you to help identify people, preserve family stories, and reconnect history through shared community projects.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.joinDescription: Take part in a community project focused on a family, town, or shared history.
howItWorks.uploadDescription: Upload historical photographs or explore images shared by others in the community.
howItWorks.preserveDescription: Tag people, add details, and contribute short stories that help bring each photograph to life.

featured.title: Featured Project: Viking Roots (Community led Initiative)
featured.description: A community-led project preserving the people and stories of Gimli, Manitoba - one photograph at a time.

cta.title: Every name identified adds meaning.
cta.description: Every story shared helps history endure.

auth.welcomeBackCopy: Sign in to continue your family story.

auth.pasteCodeHint: Paste the full code into any box.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.resetSendFailed: Unable to send a password reset code.

welcomePage.title: Welcome to Your Family Storybuilder!
welcomePage.subtitle: Let's start with a few details for your profile.
welcomePage.bubbleCopy: Let's build the first chapter of your family story.
welcomePage.privacyNote: Only you can see this. We will never share without your permission.

dashboard.happening: Here's what's happening in your family circle.
dashboard.sharePlaceholder: Share a memory, photo, or update...
dashboard.emptyFeed: Your feed is empty. Be the first to share something!
dashboard.nudgeQuestion: What traditions did your family keep?

prompts.earliestMemory: What is your earliest childhood memory?
prompts.familyTraditions: What traditions did your family keep?
prompts.storyteller: Who was the storyteller in your family?

connections.title: Family Connections
connections.empty: You haven't added any family connections yet.

profile.profileSetupCopy: Complete your profile and upload your family assets.
profile.noPostsDescription: When {{username}} shares stories or photos, they'll appear here.

errors.invalidFile: Invalid file. Must be JPEG/PNG/WebP and under 5MB.

recognition.pendingCopy: You have {{count}} new photo tags to review.
recognition.faceEnrollmentCopy: Help Viking Roots recognize you in photos shared by friends.
recognition.samplesStored: You have {{count}} face samples stored securely using advanced facial recognition.
recognition.privacyCopy: Your face data is encrypted and stored privately in our database. We use state-of-the-art AI models to recognize you in photos.
recognition.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your biometric face data? This will disable face tagging suggestions for you.
recognition.maxPhotos: Please select a maximum of 5 photos.
recognition.processingPhotos: Processing your photos... This may take 10-20 seconds.
recognition.enrollmentSuccess: Enrollment successful! You can now be tagged in photos.
recognition.enrollmentFailed: Enrollment failed. Please try again with clearer photos.
recognition.uploadError: An error occurred during upload. Please try again.
recognition.tipsLine1: Upload 3-5 clear, well-lit photos of your face
recognition.tipsLine3: Avoid sunglasses, masks, or heavy shadows
recognition.uploadPrompt: Click to upload 3-5 clear photos of your face
recognition.enableFaceTaggingCopy: Allow Viking Roots to suggest tags for you in friends' photos.
recognition.taggingScopeCopy: Who can trigger tag suggestions for you?

familyTree.title: Viking Roots
familyTree.empty: Upload a GEDCOM file or load the example to begin

ai.title: Viking Roots Questionnaire
ai.description: Discover and preserve your heritage through a guided interview.

admin.accessCopy: Log in with a staff or superuser account to manage users.
admin.queued: queued or skipped by email backend

pages.aboutCopy: Join the Viking Roots and Gimli Saga journey to preserve, discover, and celebrate family stories across generations.
pages.gimliCopy: Help build the 150th anniversary chapter with your family stories, photos, and community history.
pages.overviewCopy: Viking Roots helps you capture lineage, connect families, and preserve heritage through collaborative storytelling.

projects.title: Explore Our Projects
projects.vikingRootsCopy: Register, map your ancestry, and connect descendants across generations.
projects.gimliSagaCopy: Discover stories from the original publication and contribute new chapters.
projects.missionCopy: Help preserve heritage records and family stories for future generations.
